title: paspalum globosum
intro: Paspalum globosum is a type of tropical grass that belongs to the Poaceae family, commonly known as the millet grass. It has been traditionally used in various herbal remedies for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Paspalum globosum include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and wounds, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever and cough. In traditional herbal preparations, Paspalum globosum is often made into a tea or infused in hot water to be consumed as a treatment for various ailments.
